name: Baked Shrimp in Wine and Basil Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°F.
2. Combine the first nine ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
3. Remove one-fourth of this mixture and set aside.
4. In a shallow baking dish (or small quiche dishes), pour part of the sauce.
5. Place the shrimp around the rim (or rims) with tails over the side, making sure the meat is well coated.
6. Mix the bread crumbs with the remaining sauce and sprinkle over the dish.
7. Bake for 10 to 15 minutes.
8. Serve warm with slices of sourdough.
